channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Teen tennis player Siyolise Schultz prepares for European tour to boost international ranking
item.description: Fifteen-year-old Mowbray tennis player Siyolise Schultz is preparing for a major step in her sporting career as she plans a move to Europe to compete at a higher international level. Schultz has emerg...

item.title: Vice Ganda reacts with ‘gigil’ to entertaining Laro Laro Pick contestants on It's Showtime
item.description: The article highlights a fun and lively segment from the popular ABS-CBN noontime variety show 'It's Showtime', where the game segment 'Laro Laro Pick' once again delivered entertaining moments that h...

item.title: Trump instructs negotiators not to rush Iran agreement as nuclear talks are deferred
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has cautioned his negotiators against rushing into a deal with Iran, stating that time is on the American side. This comes after U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio suggest...

item.title: Pastor Chris Hodges transitions from lead pastor role at Church of the Highlands amid controversy discussions
item.description: Pastor Chris Hodges is a well-known American evangelical leader and founder of the Church of the Highlands (COTH), one of the largest megachurches in the United States. The church, founded in 2001 in ...

item.title: Rivers Police Detain ASP Over Escape of Suspect During Custody Incident
item.description: The Rivers State Police Command has taken into custody an Assistant Superintendent of Police (ASP), Ekawhe Thomas, following the escape of a suspected criminal from police detention. According to offi...

item.title: Search underway for missing 15-year-old boy at Swanholme Lakes in Lincoln
item.description: Emergency services in Lincoln are conducting a search operation for a 15-year-old boy who went missing after getting into difficulty in Swanholme Lakes, a local nature reserve in Lincoln. The incident...

item.title: Harry Styles and Zoë Kravitz reportedly planning small intimate winter wedding in the UK
item.description: According to recent reports, singer Harry Styles and actress Zoë Kravitz are considering a small, intimate wedding in the United Kingdom this winter, following their engagement after an eight-month ro...

item.title: Dietitian explains the causes of food cravings and practical ways to manage them
item.description: Food cravings are those intense desires for specific items like chocolate, chips or sweet treats that can strike at any time, often derailing healthy eating plans. According to accredited practising d...

item.title: West Ham face major financial and squad overhaul following relegation to the Championship
item.description: West Ham United’s relegation from the Premier League marks the end of their 14-year stay in England’s top flight, signalling a dramatic downturn for a club that lifted European silverware just three y...

item.title: NRS Assures Mining Stakeholders of Fair and Transparent Royalty Collection Under 2025 Tax Reforms
item.description: The Nigeria Revenue Service announced say e go administer mining royalties and related fees with transparency, fairness and accountability under the new tax reforms signed into law by President Bola T...

item.title: A Look Back at French Actress Dany Robin and Her Lasting Influence on 1950s and 1960s Cinema
item.description: The article revisits the life and career of French actress Dany Robin, a celebrated screen figure of the 1950s and 1960s known for her elegance, charm, and refined acting style. Born in 1927, Robin in...

item.title: Study Finds Genetic Links Between Cat and Human Cancers May Inform Future Treatments
item.description: A major international study suggests that domestic cats could play an important role in advancing cancer research for both animals and humans. Scientists analyzed nearly 500 feline tumor samples colle...

item.title: Police evict CHP leadership from headquarters amid Turkey political dispute
item.description: Turkish riot police have forcibly removed members of the main opposition Republican People’s Party (CHP) from its headquarters in Ankara, escalating a growing political crisis in Türkiye. The operatio...

item.title: Chadema reacts to Registrar’s warning letter to CCM amid claims of unequal enforcement
item.description: The Registrar of Political Parties in Tanzania has sparked debate after issuing a warning letter to the ruling party Chama Cha Mapinduzi (CCM). Opposition leaders, particularly from Chadema, have resp...

item.title: Leni Robredo calls for increased investment in preventive health care services
item.description: Naga City Mayor and former vice president Leni Robredo has urged national and local authorities to prioritise preventive health care in order to reduce the long-term burden on the Philippine health sy...

item.title: Katherine Legge crashes out of Indy 500 but continues pursuit of Memorial Day racing double at Coca-Cola 600
item.description: British racing driver Katherine Legge attempted one of motorsport’s most demanding achievements on Memorial Day weekend by competing in both the Indianapolis 500 and NASCAR’s Coca-Cola 600 on the same...

item.title: Delhi Gymkhana members prepare court challenge after Centre orders club to vacate Safdarjung Road premises
item.description: Members of the prestigious Delhi Gymkhana Club are preparing to move court against the Central government’s decision directing the club to vacate its 27.3-acre premises at Safdarjung Road in New Delhi...

item.title: Tinubu frames 2027 election as call for continuity and reform consolidation
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has positioned the 2027 presidential election as a major decision point for Nigeria, stressing that voters should prioritise continuity of ongoing reforms over what he described ...

item.title: Vintage Color Slides Reveal Winter Life in the 1950s and 1960s
item.description: This article explores the nostalgic beauty of winter landscapes captured in the 1950s and 1960s through Kodachrome color slides. It highlights how winter during this era was depicted as both visually ...

item.title: Chinese tourist safely rescued on Table Mountain after sunset disorientation during birthday hike
item.description: A 22-year-old Chinese tourist was safely rescued on Table Mountain on Saturday evening after becoming stranded during a birthday hike along the India Venster route. The hiker began her ascent in the a...
